parameters.query:
SELECT
  tt.id
FROM trade_terminals tt
JOIN locations l
  ON l.id = tt.location_id
JOIN systems s
  ON s.id = l.system_id
JOIN active_systems asys
  ON asys.id = s.id
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM prices p
  WHERE p.terminal_id = tt.id
    AND GREATEST(
          COALESCE(p.sell_price, 0),
          COALESCE(p.buy_price, 0)
        ) > 0
)
ORDER BY
  s.name NULLS LAST,
  l.name NULLS LAST,
  tt.name;

SELECT
  tt.id,
  tt.name,
  tt.terminal_type,
  l.name AS location_name,
  s.name AS system_name,

  -- how many distinct priced items (any asset_type) at this terminal
  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT COUNT(*)
      FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT
          di.asset_type,
          di.item_name,
          di.price
        FROM (
          SELECT
            p2.asset_type,
            GREATEST(
              COALESCE(p2.sell_price, 0),
              COALESCE(p2.buy_price, 0)
            ) AS price,
            COALESCE(
              p2.asset_name,
              p2.item_name,
              p2.metadata->>'commodity_name',
              p2.metadata->>'item_name',
              p2.metadata->>'name'
            ) AS item_name
          FROM prices p2
          WHERE p2.terminal_id = tt.id
            AND GREATEST(
                  COALESCE(p2.sell_price, 0),
                  COALESCE(p2.buy_price, 0)
                ) > 0
        ) AS di
      ) AS distinct_items
    ),
    0
  ) AS item_count,

  -- list of items (commodities, clothing, etc.) with prices and categories
  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT jsonb_agg(
               jsonb_build_object(
                 'item_name',      di.item_name,
                 'asset_type',     di.asset_type,
                 'commodity_code',
                   CASE
                     WHEN di.asset_type = 'commodity'
                     THEN c.metadata->>'code'
                     ELSE NULL
                   END,
                 'category',
                   CASE
                     WHEN di.asset_type = 'commodity'
                       THEN c.metadata->>'kind'
                     ELSE
                       NULLIF(
                         concat_ws(' / ', di.category_section, di.category_name),
                         ''
                       )
                   END,
                 'price',          di.price
               )
               ORDER BY di.item_name
             )
      FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT
          p1.asset_type,
          p1.commodity_id,
          GREATEST(
            COALESCE(p1.sell_price, 0),
            COALESCE(p1.buy_price, 0)
          ) AS price,
          COALESCE(
            p1.asset_name,
            p1.item_name,
            p1.metadata->>'commodity_name',
            p1.metadata->>'item_name',
            p1.metadata->>'name'
          ) AS item_name,
          (p1.metadata->>'id_category')::int AS category_id,
          (
            SELECT payload->>'name'
            FROM uex_categories_raw cat
            WHERE (cat.payload->>'id')::int = (p1.metadata->>'id_category')::int
            ORDER BY cat.fetched_at DESC
            LIMIT 1
          ) AS category_name,
          (
            SELECT payload->>'section'
            FROM uex_categories_raw cat
            WHERE (cat.payload->>'id')::int = (p1.metadata->>'id_category')::int
            ORDER BY cat.fetched_at DESC
            LIMIT 1
          ) AS category_section
        FROM prices p1
        WHERE p1.terminal_id = tt.id
          AND GREATEST(
                COALESCE(p1.sell_price, 0),
                COALESCE(p1.buy_price, 0)
              ) > 0
      ) AS di
      LEFT JOIN commodities c
        ON c.id = di.commodity_id
    ),
    '[]'::jsonb
  ) AS items_with_price

FROM trade_terminals tt
LEFT JOIN locations l
  ON l.id = tt.location_id
LEFT JOIN systems s
  ON s.id = l.system_id
WHERE tt.id = '{{$json["id"]}}';
